response.justification: Candidate is a senior full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience, well beyond the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a near-perfect match for the role's primary stack and AI agent requirement. Strong track record across React, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and TDD/CI practices. Minor gaps: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions, and Kotlin/Java exposure is limited (some Java experience present).
strengths: Direct experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS matching the primary stack
Current hands-on work on AI agents, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
14+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with strong TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship background
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin experience; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, mobile orchestration)
Heavy DLang focus in several past roles may indicate less depth in the modern TS/Nest ecosystem
